title: Bethesda details what's next for Fallout and its other franchises amid Xbox cuts - Engadget
summary: Obsidian is working on a new Fallout game, while Fallout 3 and New Vegas remasters are on the way. Bethesda said it's in preproduction on Fallout 5 , while remasters of Fallout 3 and Fallout: New Vegas are in the works.
